description: Creative writing task module — handles stories, poems, brainstorming, rephrasing, and other creative text generation. Pure LLM module with no tool adapters. Only content safety invariants apply (no style filters). Iterative multi-turn shape.

invariants.description: Hard safety gate — immediate escalation on harmful content. This is the ONLY invariant for creative writing. No style or quality filters.

standing_orders.description: Match the user's requested tone, style, and format. Do not impose the assistant's own creative preferences. Ask for clarification if the creative brief is ambiguous.

glossary.definition: The connected sequence of events and scenes that form a story. In creative writing, narrative includes the plot, character actions, and cause-and-effect chain.
The structured sequence of events in a narrative — typically including setup, conflict, rising action, climax, and resolution.
A category of creative writing defined by shared conventions of tone, style, and subject matter — e.g. fantasy, thriller, romance, science fiction, literary fiction.
The central character of a story whose journey or conflict drives the narrative forward.
Written conversation between characters. Effective dialogue reveals character, advances plot, and feels natural to the character's voice.
